title: Just Move In Integration — Setup & Management

content.intro: Just Move In (JMI) is PropertyGoose's recommended utility switching partner and is enabled by default for all companies. No manual setup is required to begin receiving utility notifications.

steps.title: Enabled by Default
steps.content: JMI is enabled by default for all PropertyGoose companies. No API key or manual connection is needed to start receiving utility notifications.

steps.title: Automatic Move-In Notifications
steps.content: When a new tenancy is created and you tick the JMI checkbox, PropertyGoose notifies JMI of the move-in. JMI then contacts relevant utility providers on your behalf.

steps.title: Automatic Move-Out Notifications
steps.content: When you end a tenancy and tick the JMI checkbox, PropertyGoose sends a move-out notification to JMI. Utility providers are informed that the tenancy has ended.

steps.title: Tenant Change Notifications
steps.content: Tenant changes are notified to JMI automatically as part of the tenant change workflow. No checkbox is required.

steps.title: Bills Included Properties Excluded
steps.content: Properties with the Bills Included flag set in PropertyGoose are automatically excluded from all JMI notifications. No utility switching is triggered for these properties.

steps.title: To Opt Out
steps.content: To disable JMI for your entire company, go to Settings → Company → Management Info and untick 'Use PropertyGoose's Partner Just Move In'.

sections.title: Silent Background Notifications
sections.content: JMI notifications are sent silently in the background and do not interrupt the tenancy workflow. If a notification fails, it will not block any actions in PropertyGoose.

sections.title: Manual Responsibility if Opted Out
sections.content: If you opt out of JMI, your agency becomes responsible for notifying utility providers of all tenancy changes manually. PropertyGoose will not send any utility notifications once JMI is disabled.
